data.body:
Design investigation: behavioral-comparison prompt + scope-drift protection for rebar's gates.

Findings (code): completion verifier (src/rebar/llm/completion.py + reviewers/completion_verifier.md) judges ticket vs pinned HEAD tree with read-only tools; it does NOT use commit trailers/file_impact/verify_commands for ticket<->code association. Gerrit review-bot reviews the diff in isolation: {{ticket_context}} prompt slots are filled with the DIFF (batch_runner.py:58, code-review.yaml:63-64); voter never extracts the rebar-ticket trailer or passes target_ticket, though produce_code_review_verdict accepts one and the attested tickets store is already materialized. verify-commit-ticket checks only that the id resolves — no content/status/claimant check. Net gap: no gate checks a diff semantically serves its named ticket; no scope-creep detection anywhere.

Research: Jin & Chen ASE 2025 (arXiv:2508.12358) — Behavioral Comparison Prompt (blind spec-summary + blind impl-summary, then compare) lifts correct-code recognition 52%->85-90%; rich single-pass judging (our current verifier shape) is the documented FP failure mode. BitsAI-CR: independent verify stage 25%->75% precision, conclusion-first output. Qodo/CodeRabbit: diff<->linked-ticket compliance is the production scope-check pattern; no published detector research — file_impact is a unique deterministic prior. Google Tricorder: advisory-first, ~10% not-useful demotion budget, blocking only for near-deterministic/execution-verified checks.

Proposal (4 parts): (1) restructure completion-verification.yaml into 3 steps — spec_summary (ticket only), impl_summary (code only, worklist = file_impact + trailer-linked paths, ticket prose withheld), compare (1-TURN conclusion-first); keep reconcile_verdict + signing unchanged. (2) Wire target_ticket into the Gerrit voter (extract_ticket_refs exists) + new advisory ticket-alignment LLM overlay + prompt-less DET files-outside-file_impact criterion in code_review/criteria_routing.json. (3) Asymmetric posture: under-delivery can FAIL (as today); over-delivery is advisory-only in v1, coach message names discovered_from/file_impact/AC-amend as the cure; scope amendments that only ADD file_impact should qualify for the drift_refresh lightweight re-sign path (attest.py) to avoid staling the plan-review attestation. Per-criterion noise budget (~10% override rate -> demote) before any blocking promotion. (4) Advisory ticket-status warning in verify-commit-ticket; untrailered commits not chased (completion verifier reads final tree, so correctness doesn't depend on trailer coverage).

Rollout: plumbing+DET -> behavioral-comparison verifier (eval before/after on eval_specs fixtures) -> ticket-alignment overlay advisory + telemetry -> earned per-criterion blocking.
